title: FileLen Function
parameters:
fileName	A string expression containing the file name to check. This includes both drive name and path name.

If only the file name is specified, the file is checked in the current directory.

See ChDisk for the details.

Note: A network path is available.
description:
FileLen Function

FileLen Function

See_Also Example

Returns the size of a file.
see_also:
FileDateTime$

FileExists

FileLen Function Example

String myPath$

myPath$ = "ｃ:\TEST\TEST.DAT"

If FileExists(myPath$) Then

  Print "Last access date and time: ", FileDateTime$(myPath$)

  Print "Size: ", FileLen(myPath$)

EndIf
examples:
String myPath$
myPath$ = "ｃ:\TEST\TEST.DAT"
If FileExists(myPath$) Then Print "Last access date and time: ", FileDateTime$(myPath$) Print "Size: ", FileLen(myPath$)
EndIf
